query: INSERT INTO tenant_sso (tenant_id, issuer_url, client_id, client_secret, default_role) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET issuer_url = EXCLUDED.issuer_url, client_id = EXCLUDED.client_id, client_secret = EXCLUDED.client_secret, default_role = EXCLUDED.default_role
